name: Is Yatirim Menkul Degerler Anonim Sirketi
summary: Is Yatirim Menkul Degerler Anonim Sirketi, through its subsidiaries, provides capital market solutions to individual and institutional investors in Turkey and internationally. The company offers corporate finance services, such as equity public offerings, private sector debt securities issuances, mergers and acquisitions, private sector advisory, project finance consultancy and venture capital advisory, private equity advisory, and debt and equity capital market services; investment advisory services; asset management services; and institutional sale, market making, and liquidity providing services, as well as traditional Brokerage services. It also provides fixed income securities; repo products; investment funds; foreign exchange products; warrants; and structured products, as well as services in stocks, derivatives, and international markets. The company serves customers through a network of 21 branches. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey.
